description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a metallic copper-colored top and a dark gray body. The front features the brand name 'Ssiips' in bold yellow letters above an image of a glass filled with iced tea, lemon slices, and ice cubes, with the text 'Original Lemon Iced Tea' below. The sides of the carton display famous quotes, one from Ernest Hemingway and another from Euripides, printed in black text. The back of the carton contains a detailed nutrition facts panel in black and white. The top of the carton has a metallic sheen and a visible pull tab for opening. The overall appearance is modern and visually striking, with a combination of matte and metallic finishes.
description: A rectangular juice carton with a metallic copper top, dark gray body, and bold yellow branding, featuring a lemon iced tea illustration and nutrition facts panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'Ssiips' brand, lemon iced tea illustration, and product name prominently.
description_view_1: Side view displays a Hemingway quote and the metallic copper top with a visible pull tab.
description_view_2: Back view features a detailed nutrition facts panel covering most of the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a Euripides quote and the metallic copper top with pull tab.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: glass of iced tea with lemon slices
